step1.title: Collect Sources
step1.description: Bring literature, materials, references, and problem context into one workspace.

step2.title: Form Judgment
step2.description: Clarify the research question, structure, and key arguments around the target outcome.

step3.title: Generate Drafts
step3.description: Keep abstracts, outlines, sections, and proposal text connected as they evolve.

step4.title: Revise & Review
step4.description: Advance rewriting, review, and feedback without losing context.

step5.title: Preserve Outputs
step5.description: Archive deliverables, process records, and intermediate artifacts together.
